summary: Completed testing of Jobflow UI fixes: Social icons bar implementation, Gmail domain parameter support, and sponsorship badge text updates. Most features working correctly with minor issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Icons not showing faded state (opacity 0.3) when URL is cleared - remains at opacity 1

passed_tests: Social icons bar displays 5 icons (LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Globe) in horizontal row
Social icons are correctly sized 32x32px with borderRadius 8
No old-style text labels (LinkedIn: —) found in UI
Right-click on social icons activates edit mode with inline input
Notes field visible below social icons section
Backend accepts domain query parameter for Gmail emails endpoint
Backend returns appropriate error when Gmail not connected
Company profile accepts all social media URL fields
Sponsorship badges show correct 'Sponsors visas' text
All existing features still work: board, right panel sections, kanban
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix social icon opacity behavior: Icons should show opacity 0.3 when URL is empty/cleared, and opacity 1 when URL is set. Currently icons remain at full opacity even after URL is cleared.
